name: appstore_reviews
description: Fetch public App Store customer reviews for an app (rating, title, body, reviewer, territory). For TestFlight beta feedback use testflight_feedback instead.

bundleId.description: The bundle ID of the app (e.g., com.example.myapp)

limit.description: Maximum number of reviews to return (default: 20, max: 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response, to fetch the next page
